# Spec Index

A registry of every spec in the collection, generated from the specs'
frontmatter (`npm run index`).

## Elements

| Spec | id | Version | Status | Summary |
| --------- | -- | ------- | ------ | ------- |
| [Aspect Ratio](specs/elements/aspect-ratio.md) | `aspect-ratio` | 1.0.0 | stable | A layout primitive that constrains content to a fixed width-to-height proportion. |
| [Avatar](specs/elements/avatar.md) | `avatar` | 1.0.0 | stable | A compact visual representation of a person or entity, with a graceful fallback when no image is available. |
| [Badge](specs/elements/badge.md) | `badge` | 1.0.0 | stable | A small label that annotates an element with a status, category, or count. |
| [Button](specs/elements/button.md) | `button` | 1.1.0 | stable | An interactive control that triggers an action or event when activated. |
| [Checkbox](specs/elements/checkbox.md) | `checkbox` | 1.0.0 | stable | A control for toggling a single option on or off, or selecting several from a set. |
| [Icon](specs/elements/icon.md) | `icon` | 1.0.0 | stable | A small pictographic symbol that conveys meaning or reinforces a label compactly. |
| [Icon Button](specs/elements/icon-button.md) | `icon-button` | 1.0.0 | stable | A compact, icon-only button that triggers an action where space is tight. |
| [Keyboard Key](specs/elements/kbd.md) | `kbd` | 1.0.0 | stable | An inline representation of a key or key combination the user can press. |
| [Label](specs/elements/label.md) | `label` | 1.0.0 | stable | A short caption that names a form control and is programmatically bound to it. |
| [Legend](specs/elements/legend.md) | `legend` | 1.0.0 | stable | A key that maps a chart's colors or symbols to the series they represent. |
| [Link](specs/elements/link.md) | `link` | 1.0.0 | stable | A navigational control that takes the user to another location or resource. |
| [Logo](specs/elements/logo.md) | `logo` | 1.0.0 | stable | A brand mark that identifies the product or organization and usually links home. |
| [One-Time-Code Input](specs/elements/input-otp.md) | `input-otp` | 1.0.0 | stable | A segmented field for entering a short verification code one character per slot. |
| [Progress](specs/elements/progress.md) | `progress` | 1.0.0 | stable | A visual indicator of how far a task has advanced toward completion. |
| [Radio Group](specs/elements/radio-group.md) | `radio-group` | 1.0.0 | stable | A set of mutually exclusive options from which exactly one can be selected. |
| [Scroll Area](specs/elements/scroll-area.md) | `scroll-area` | 1.0.0 | stable | A container that scrolls overflowing content with consistent, styleable scrollbars. |
| [Separator](specs/elements/separator.md) | `separator` | 1.0.0 | stable | A thin divider that visually and semantically separates groups of content. |
| [Skeleton](specs/elements/skeleton.md) | `skeleton` | 1.0.0 | stable | A placeholder that mirrors the shape of content while it loads. |
| [Slider](specs/elements/slider.md) | `slider` | 1.0.0 | stable | A control for choosing a value or range by dragging a handle along a track. |
| [Spinner](specs/elements/spinner.md) | `spinner` | 1.0.0 | stable | A compact, indeterminate indicator that signals a short, ongoing wait. |
| [Switch](specs/elements/switch.md) | `switch` | 1.0.0 | stable | A control that toggles a single setting on or off with an immediate effect. |
| [Text Input](specs/elements/input.md) | `input` | 1.0.0 | stable | A single-line field that lets a person enter and edit a short piece of text. |
| [Textarea](specs/elements/textarea.md) | `textarea` | 1.0.0 | stable | A multi-line field for entering and editing longer free-form text. |
| [Toggle](specs/elements/toggle.md) | `toggle` | 1.0.0 | stable | A two-state button that can be turned on or off, often used in toolbars. |
| [Toggle Group](specs/elements/toggle-group.md) | `toggle-group` | 1.0.0 | stable | A set of toggles acting as a single control for single- or multi-selection. |
| [Typography](specs/elements/typography.md) | `typography` | 1.0.0 | stable | The system of text styles — headings, body, and inline elements — that gives content hierarchy and rhythm. |

## Components

| Spec | id | Version | Status | Summary |
| --------- | -- | ------- | ------ | ------- |
| [Accordion](specs/components/accordion.md) | `accordion` | 1.0.0 | stable | A stack of headers that expand and collapse to reveal or hide sections of content. |
| [Alert](specs/components/alert.md) | `alert` | 1.0.0 | stable | An inline message that draws attention to important, contextual information. |
| [Alert Dialog](specs/components/alert-dialog.md) | `alert-dialog` | 1.0.0 | stable | A blocking modal that interrupts to confirm a consequential or irreversible action. |
| [Breadcrumb](specs/components/breadcrumb.md) | `breadcrumb` | 1.0.0 | stable | A trail showing the current location within a hierarchy and the path back to the top. |
| [Button Group](specs/components/button-group.md) | `button-group` | 1.0.0 | stable | A set of related buttons joined into a single visual unit. |
| [Calendar](specs/components/calendar.md) | `calendar` | 1.0.0 | stable | A grid of dates for viewing a month and selecting one or more days. |
| [Card](specs/components/card.md) | `card` | 1.0.0 | stable | A self-contained surface that groups related content and actions into a single unit. |
| [Carousel](specs/components/carousel.md) | `carousel` | 1.0.0 | stable | A scrollable, paged set of items revealed a few at a time with navigation controls. |
| [Chart](specs/components/chart.md) | `chart` | 1.0.0 | stable | A visual encoding of data — bars, lines, areas, and more — that reveals patterns and comparisons. |
| [Collapsible](specs/components/collapsible.md) | `collapsible` | 1.0.0 | stable | A single region that expands and collapses to show or hide its content. |
| [Combobox](specs/components/combobox.md) | `combobox` | 1.0.0 | stable | A text input paired with a filtered list of suggestions for selecting a value. |
| [Command Palette](specs/components/command.md) | `command` | 1.0.0 | stable | A searchable list of commands and destinations for fast, keyboard-driven navigation and action. |
| [Comment](specs/components/comment.md) | `comment` | 1.0.0 | stable | A single unit of user-authored discussion, with author, content, and actions. |
| [Context Menu](specs/components/context-menu.md) | `context-menu` | 1.0.0 | stable | A menu of actions relevant to a specific element, opened by right-click or long-press. |
| [Data Table](specs/components/data-table.md) | `data-table` | 1.0.0 | stable | An interactive table for exploring rows of structured data with sorting, filtering, and paging. |
| [Date Picker](specs/components/date-picker.md) | `date-picker` | 1.0.0 | stable | A field that lets users enter or choose a date (or range) via typing and a calendar. |
| [Dialog](specs/components/dialog.md) | `dialog` | 1.0.0 | stable | A modal overlay that focuses the user on a self-contained task or piece of content. |
| [Drawer](specs/components/drawer.md) | `drawer` | 1.0.0 | stable | A panel that slides in from a screen edge, often swipe-driven, for content or actions. |
| [Dropdown Menu](specs/components/dropdown-menu.md) | `dropdown-menu` | 1.0.0 | stable | A button-triggered menu of actions, revealed in a floating list. |
| [Empty State](specs/components/empty-state.md) | `empty-state` | 1.0.0 | stable | A placeholder shown when there is no content yet, guiding the user toward a first action. |
| [Field](specs/components/field.md) | `field` | 1.0.0 | stable | A wrapper that pairs a form control with its label, help text, and validation message. |
| [Footer](specs/components/footer.md) | `footer` | 1.0.0 | stable | A page-closing region with secondary navigation, legal, and trust information. |
| [Form](specs/components/form.md) | `form` | 1.0.0 | stable | A structured set of fields that collects, validates, and submits user input toward a goal. |
| [Hover Card](specs/components/hover-card.md) | `hover-card` | 1.0.0 | stable | A rich preview surface revealed when a pointer rests on a trigger. |
| [Input Group](specs/components/input-group.md) | `input-group` | 1.0.0 | stable | An input combined with adjacent add-ons or controls that act as one composite control. |
| [List](specs/components/list.md) | `list` | 1.0.0 | stable | A vertical sequence of related items, each a compact row of content and actions. |
| [Menubar](specs/components/menubar.md) | `menubar` | 1.0.0 | stable | A horizontal bar of top-level menus exposing an application's commands. |
| [Navbar](specs/components/navbar.md) | `navbar` | 1.0.0 | stable | A persistent top-level bar that anchors identity and primary navigation across a product. |
| [Navigation Menu](specs/components/navigation-menu.md) | `navigation-menu` | 1.0.0 | stable | A primary navigation control whose items can open rich flyout panels of links. |
| [Pagination](specs/components/pagination.md) | `pagination` | 1.0.0 | stable | Controls for moving through content split across multiple pages. |
| [Popover](specs/components/popover.md) | `popover` | 1.0.0 | stable | A floating surface anchored to a trigger, holding contextual content or controls. |
| [Resizable Panels](specs/components/resizable.md) | `resizable` | 1.0.0 | stable | Adjacent panels separated by draggable handles that let users redistribute space. |
| [Search](specs/components/search.md) | `search` | 1.0.0 | stable | An input-led pattern for querying content, with suggestions, clearing, and results. |
| [Select](specs/components/select.md) | `select` | 1.0.0 | stable | A control that opens a list for choosing one option (or several) from a defined set. |
| [Sheet](specs/components/sheet.md) | `sheet` | 1.0.0 | stable | A panel that slides in from a screen edge for secondary content or tasks alongside the page. |
| [Sidebar](specs/components/sidebar.md) | `sidebar` | 1.0.0 | stable | A persistent vertical navigation region alongside the main content of an application. |
| [Stat](specs/components/stat.md) | `stat` | 1.0.0 | stable | A compact display of a single key metric with its label and optional trend. |
| [Table](specs/components/table.md) | `table` | 1.0.0 | stable | A grid of rows and columns for presenting structured, comparable data. |
| [Tabs](specs/components/tabs.md) | `tabs` | 1.0.0 | stable | A set of labeled sections where selecting a tab reveals its associated panel in place. |
| [Toast](specs/components/toast.md) | `toast` | 1.0.0 | stable | A brief, self-dismissing message that confirms an action or reports a background event. |
| [Toolbar](specs/components/toolbar.md) | `toolbar` | 1.0.0 | stable | A grouped row of controls that act on the current view or selection. |
| [Tooltip](specs/components/tooltip.md) | `tooltip` | 1.0.0 | stable | A brief text label that appears on hover or focus to clarify an element. |

## Behaviors

Cross-cutting interaction contracts shared by many specs (see `traits/`).

| Trait | id | Summary |
| ----- | -- | ------- |
| [Anchored](traits/anchored.md) | `anchored` | A floating surface is positioned relative to a trigger, staying visible by flipping and shifting to avoid the viewport edges. |
| [Dismissible](traits/dismissible.md) | `dismissible` | A transient surface can be closed by Escape, an outside interaction, or an explicit close affordance, and returns control cleanly. |
| [Focus Trap](traits/focus-trap.md) | `focus-trap` | While a modal surface is open, keyboard focus is confined to it and restored to the trigger when it closes. |
| [Roving Focus](traits/roving-focus.md) | `roving-focus` | A group of related controls exposes a single tab stop; arrow keys move focus among the items. |
| [Typeahead](traits/typeahead.md) | `typeahead` | Typing printable characters moves focus (or selection) to the item whose label matches, for fast keyboard access in a list. |
